fields.description:
## Why
The review-bot-ops runbook tells operators to run things 'On the box (SSM Session Manager)' but never states the instance id or region needed to actually start that session. The region IS single-sourced in terraform (var.aws_region default = us-east-1, backend pinned in versions.tf) and the instance id appears in ADR-0026, but neither is in the operational runbook where someone doing an SSM deploy looks — so they end up guessing the region. Surfaced during the f600 deploy.

## What
Add a 'The box (where prod runs)' reference section near the top of infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md: instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5, region us-east-1 (citing var.aws_region / versions.tf as the source of truth), account 896586841071, and the 'aws ssm start-session'/'send-command' connect snippets.

Also include an ACCURATE note on autodeploy self-update (autodeploy.sh:74-93, 92-93): the autodeploy.sh BODY DOES auto-update in place via the BOT_PATHS rsync like any other source; a commit touching ONLY autodeploy.sh triggers no deploy so it won't rsync itself until the next bot-path deploy (hence a script-only change is hand-deployed to go live immediately). Separately, the INSTALLER (install-autodeploy.sh) + rebar-autodeploy.{service,timer} unit files ARE excluded from in-run re-materialization (self-modification race) and always need a hand-deploy. (Do NOT state 'autodeploy.sh is excluded from self-update' — that is false per lines 92-93.)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md names the prod instance id AND region up front, with region traced to its terraform source of truth (var.aws_region / versions.tf).
- [ ] Includes the SSM connect command(s).
- [ ] The self-update note is accurate: autodeploy.sh body auto-updates via BOT_PATHS rsync; only installer/unit-files are re-materialization-excluded; script-only changes hand-deployed because they trigger no rsync.
- [ ] Docs-only change; no behavior change.

## File impact
- [{"path":"infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md","reason":"add 'The box' reference section: instance/region/account + SSM connect + accurate autodeploy self-update note"}]

## Out of scope
- Changing where the region is defined (stays var.aws_region in terraform).
